content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt calls the build a "public beta" and warns of "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2)
Pierre: Apple reviewers read release notes as store-facing copy, and language like "public beta"/"expect rough edges" signals an unfinished build, which can trigger a 2.2 rejection or review question even if the binary is stable. Rewrite the release notes to describe shipped features factually (e.g. "Improved sync reliability") without beta/testing disclaimers, reserving TestFlight language for actual beta builds.
